attrs.data-alt: A highly complex, technical 3D wireframe mesh representing a digital neural network. The style is minimalist and high-fidelity, featuring thin luminescent lines on a deep obsidian background. Subtle indigo glows emanate from the nodes of the network, creating a sophisticated and futuristic atmosphere of advanced interconnected artificial intelligence architecture.
